recommendations.title: Captain Nova
recommendations.overview: A fighter pilot travels back in time to save the future world from environmental disaster, but a side-effect turns her young again and no-one takes her seriously.

recommendations.title: The White Helmets
recommendations.overview: As daily airstrikes pound civilian targets in Syria, a group of indomitable first responders risk their lives to rescue victims from the rubble.

recommendations.title: Hercules and the Amazon Women

recommendations.title: Dr. Strange
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist becomes the new Sorcerer Supreme of the Earth in order to battle an evil Sorceress from the past.

recommendations.title: Transformers Prime: Beast Hunters - Predacons Rising
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Autobots, Decepticons, Predaking and Predacons form an unlikely alliance to battle a resurrected Unicron.
recommendations.director: Vinton Heuck, Scooter Tidwell, Todd Waterman

recommendations.title: Double World
recommendations.overview: Keen to bring honor to his clan, young villager Dong Yilong embarks on a perilous journey to compete in a tournament that selects warriors for battle.

recommendations.title: Cadet Kelly
recommendations.overview: Hyperactive teenager Kelly is enrolled into a military school when her new stepfather becomes the Commandant. At first she has problems fitting in and taking orders until she tries out for the drill team.

recommendations.title: Meet the Robinsons
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Lewis, a brilliant young inventor, is keen on creating a time machine to find his mother, who abandoned him in an orphanage. Things take a turn when he meets Wilbur Robinson and his family.

recommendations.title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do the Universe
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.
